message: fix(ci): add submodules checkout to node-ci workflow

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,8 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: recursive
 
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
@@ -62,6 +64,8 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: recursive
 
       - name: Setup Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
